blocker: Production SSH connection material is absent from GitHub repository secrets. The workflow cannot SSH to the production server, so it cannot pull runtime images, run docker compose up, run preflight, or run the real backend load test.
nextRequiredAction: Add the production SSH secrets or provide equivalent production deploy access, then rerun prod-runtime-redeploy.yml on main. If secrets cannot be added, run pasteable-server-commands.md on the production host and provide the output/artifacts.
